title: Mossel Bay Ice Bucket Challenge: Help break last year’s record at Van Riebeeck Stadium today
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - They set an unofficial Ice Bucket Challenge world record last year and they’re aiming to do it again today, Wednesday, 29 October, at 13:30.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - They set an unofficial Ice Bucket Challenge world record last year and they’re aiming to do it again today, Wednesday, 29 October, at 13:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Last year, Eden Protocol made waves by hosting the biggest ever of these events, with an unofficial world record of 912 participants.","html":"Last year, Eden Protocol made waves by hosting the biggest ever of these events, with an unofficial world record of 912 participants."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This year, Point High School, Curro Mossel Bay, Park Primary and many more are on board and they’re hoping to make it even bigger and better."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All the action is happening at the Van Riebeeck Stadium this afternoon.","html":"All the action is happening at the Van Riebeeck Stadium this afternoon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The good news is, it’s not too late to get tickets! Get them on WeTicket or buy them at the gate on arrival - R50 per person. Get there early enough so you can be ready and in your seat by 13:30.","html":"The good news is, it’s not too late to get tickets! Get them on WeTicket or buy them at the gate on arrival - R50 per person. Get there early enough so you can be ready and in your seat by 13:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Funds raised will go towards children in need in Mossel Bay. Read more about the cause here.","html":"Funds raised will go towards children in need in Mossel Bay. Read more about the cause here."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay Ice Bucket Challenge: Help break last year’s record at Van Riebeeck Stadium today
